  1. org.springframework.cloud.stream.binder.pulsar.properties

Uses of Package
org.springframework.cloud.stream.binder.pulsar.properties

Packages that use org.springframework.cloud.stream.binder.pulsar.properties
Package
Description
org.springframework.cloud.stream.binder.pulsar
Package containing Spring Cloud Stream binder classes for Apache Pulsar.
org.springframework.cloud.stream.binder.pulsar.config
 
org.springframework.cloud.stream.binder.pulsar.properties
Package containing Spring Cloud Stream binder properties classes for Apache Pulsar.
org.springframework.cloud.stream.binder.pulsar.provisioning
Package containing Spring Cloud Stream binder provisioning classes for Apache Pulsar.
  • Classes in org.springframework.cloud.stream.binder.pulsar.properties used by org.springframework.cloud.stream.binder.pulsar
    Class
    Description
    PulsarBinderConfigurationProperties
    @ConfigurationProperties for the Pulsar binder.
    PulsarConsumerProperties
    Pulsar consumer properties used by the binder.
    PulsarExtendedBindingProperties
    @ConfigurationProperties for Pulsar binder specific extensions to the common binding properties.
    PulsarProducerProperties
    Pulsar producer properties used by the binder.
  • Classes in org.springframework.cloud.stream.binder.pulsar.properties used by org.springframework.cloud.stream.binder.pulsar.config
    Class
    Description
    PulsarBinderConfigurationProperties
    @ConfigurationProperties for the Pulsar binder.
    PulsarExtendedBindingProperties
    @ConfigurationProperties for Pulsar binder specific extensions to the common binding properties.
  • Classes in org.springframework.cloud.stream.binder.pulsar.properties used by org.springframework.cloud.stream.binder.pulsar.properties
    Class
    Description
    ConsumerConfigProperties
    Configuration properties used to specify Pulsar consumers.
    ConsumerConfigProperties.Acknowledgement
     
    ConsumerConfigProperties.Chunking
     
    ConsumerConfigProperties.Subscription
     
    ProducerConfigProperties
    Configuration properties used to specify Pulsar producers.
    ProducerConfigProperties.Batching
     
    PulsarBindingProperties
    Container for Pulsar specific extended producer and consumer binding properties.
    PulsarConsumerProperties
    Pulsar consumer properties used by the binder.
    PulsarProducerProperties
    Pulsar producer properties used by the binder.
